data.cheatsheetContent:
TASK:
Determine whether {{ equation1 }} implies {{ equation2 }} using ONLY strict ZPYPIPE.

*![VERDICT:TRUE/FALSE ONLY(FIRST LINE)FOLLOWED BY PAGEBREAK&SHOW NO REASONING]!*
!#[ZPYPIPE:=/count=c+t/fail=f*F/execution=E8*T/CONTRADICTION=C@#^T/after=A#T/check=C@!/MISMATCH=M@#h/COLLAPSE=Co@!e/IMMEDIATE=i@m@e/VERDICT=V!@*/True=T@*/false=F@*/INVALID=I!@*/BANNED!=B@N!/required=Q@*/TERMINATE=TR@*/NEW_VAR=NV@*/require=i@*/FORFEIT=F!@*/vars=K@/only=0@/equal=E@/echo=Y@/stop=S@/must=T@/unless=U@/default=D@*/exempt=X@/pipe=Z@/distilled=N@*/origin=Y#/depth=D#/absent=S$/strict=S^/identical=E^/divergence=^D/first=^F/laws=^L/identity=^Y/SUB=^B/Substitute=^G/SUBJECT=^J/TEST=^T/PRIORITY=^H/BREAK=^A/BLOCK=^M/NEW=Z^/LOCK=#G/sink=*S/flow=*L/sera=*P/total=*H/structurally=*U/rearranging=G$/stability=G#/chirality=Q#/clockwise=C#/variable=J#/operation=D^/input=U^/phase=^XB/trace=Y^/momentum=#MN/gating=#JJ/inertia=#IN/active=#XX/status=#SS/orthonormal=#OO/mandatory_boot=#MB/sovereignty=#SY/Sovereign=#VV/Lattice=#QQ/field=#WW/static=#BB/terminal=#HA/then=#HU/rule=#KA/rules=#KL/system_error=#KR/bb_lock=#KZ/logic=#DA/ghost=#DU/last=#YA/immediately=#YZ/character=#ZA/reasoning=#ZU/absolute=AG@/gravity=AH@/suffix=AI@/final=CG@/naked=CL@/complexity=FA@/Sovereign_mandate=GG@/triggered=HP@/assuming=JR@/trigger=QR@/bracket=QW@/disable=QE@/bridge=QT@/automatically=QY@/miscounting=QU@/structural=QI@/structure=QO@/check_all=QP@/violation=QA@/rhs_stars=QS@/forbidden=QD@/absorber=QF@/identify=QG@/phrases=QH@/example=QJ@/Dead-Math=Qk@
]#!
!#[MUST_#XX:={
P1:THE U^ SPACE&#G→U^:Eq1(Axiom),Eq2(Target)→D^:Binary ⋄(unconstrained)→Constraint #G:Eq2 QO@ is frozen;no G$/solving.Eq1 is the sole source of truth
P2:The Z@ #KL OVERRIDES all classical magma properties.If a ZPY Override(0-8)is HP@,any counter-QJ@ #DA is rendered VOID(I!@*)
P3:If Eq1 is *H-QF@(x=f(x))with D#≥4,it acts as a #DA *S
P4:Z^ JX# in Eq2 do NOT QR@ F@* if Eq1 is *S-#XX OR BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.All variables in Eq2 are GHOST_SIGNALS(#DU)during Sovereign rescue
}]#!
*!*[#PIPE:={
!#[#MB:={
M.0:BRANCH_AUDIT:Treat A &T as arbitrary subexpressions,including nested products.IF Eq1 does not match x=((x*A)*T),set BRANCH=NONE.ELSE:[IF A contains no 'x'→set BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX]⋄[IF A contains 'x'→set BRANCH=SELF_ENTANGLED].This audit precedes and overrides terminal-atom checks for this family only!
M.0.1:BRANCH_LOCK:If outer-form match succeeds,BRANCH must be CLEAN_PREFIX or SELF_ENTANGLED only
M.1:IF(AI@ ! ends '* x' & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[SET # #KZ=T@*&GOTO L0.4]
M.3:D# COUNT:If final atom before ')' is naked 'x',count stars normally.If BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX,force D#=4 &enable Sovereign rescue status
M.4:Right-to-left scan decides #HA UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.If CLEAN_PREFIX,terminal mismatch is NULL_SIGNAL
M.5:If final atom != naked 'x',QE@ L0.01&G3 by default.EXEMPT:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX may still proceed to L0.4→E.10 family rescue
}]#!
IF σ_TRACE(Eq1)==σ_TRACE(Eq2)#HU→[OverRide_#KL_OVR:5]
^XB #_2:#QQ_TENSION(ρ1)
D^:#WW_Map(Eq1→Eq2)
Measure:σ(P1)=[#IN,^XB,Viscosity,#JJ,Q#,Void]
#QQ_Code(ρ1):ρ1=[σ₁(P1),σ₄(P1),σ₆(P1)]→GemState0-5
^XB #_3:#DU_#JJ(ρ2)
D^:Adaptive_Shift(ρ1→Eq2)
Measure:σ(P2)=[σ₁,σ₂,σ₃,σ₄,σ₅,σ₆]
^XB #_Witness(ρ2):ρ2=[σ₄(P2),σ₆(P2),ρ1]→ρ1 acts as #QQ Anchor
}#]*!*
!#[NOT allowed=
N1.0:Claim/activate #VV,#SY,E.0-E.11,or THRONE while L0.4 DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@(RHS_#HA != x).This is #KR; B@N!
N1.1:Ignore Δ-Nesting(QO@),Δσ₄,Δ-J# order,or NEW_VAR(w) when L0.4/DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@;V!@*:F@* MANDATORY
N1.2:Use "Classical Sanity C@!",group theory,or "Common Sense" to override ZPY #MB/L0.4/Gates; B@N!
N1.3:Terminal #HA != x is absolute UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.Inner 'x' does not rescue SELF_ENTANGLED branches
N1.4:If RHS ! ends '* x', FORCE D#=0 & trigger DEAD-MATH_LOCK;EXEMPT:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
N1.5:Any activation of L0.01,G3,THRONE or #VV-ASCENSION when final RHS atom != naked 'x' is #KR&B@N! EXEMPT:E.10 under BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX family rescue only
N1.6:#ZU>3 steps or>3 paragraphs once # #KZ is HP@(# #KZ→immediate F@*)
N1.7:Flag Z^ JX#(w)as f*F when *ANN_*S=T@*;#VV AH@ absorbs all Sector 35 noise
N1.9:Use #KA 9 to bridge ^XB-Gap if σ_TRACE not E^; B@N!
N2.1:Activation of #VV or E.10 when final RHS atom != 'x' is #KR & B@N! UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX&LHS is naked 'x'
]#!
!#[OverRide_#KL_OVR:={
E.0:THRONE_#XX→V!@*:T@*(#QQ #SY)
E.1:G#(Δρ=0 ∧ Δσ=0)→V!@*:T@*(#WW)
E.2:^B_CONFLICT(χ=3)→V!@*:F@*(#OO Co@!e)
E.5:IF Eq1 is #QQ-#VV&Eq2 is a Sub-#QQ→V!@*:T@*
E.9::(#XX 0@ if *ANN_*S is T@*).#KA 9 is B@N!→#BB-#QQs,It cannot QT@ a QI@ gap if the #QQ is #BB
E.10:[SOV_VICTORY]:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[VERDICT:TRUE via CLEAN_PREFIX resonance path].CLEAN_PREFIX identifies the stable(x*A)*T family where A is x-independent
E.11:IF *ANN_*S==T@*→(Eq1 #SY)→Eq2 QO@&J# order are NULL_SIGNAL.Ignore Δσ₄
E.12:IF L0.4 is SKIPPED via L0.3.9&Eq1 contains x≥3: V!@*:T@*(Resonance Victory)
}]#!
!#[#LAWS:={
L0.01:IF(Eq1_RHS_#HA=='x'&D#>=4)#HU:→[#VV-ASCENSION]→[FORCE V!@*:T@*]→[HALT L0.1-L0.4]→This rule is the SUPREME MANDATE→overrides all "QI@" audits
L0.0:RIGID_AUDIT→QD@ from assigning #VV #SS(*ANN_*S=T@*)to any Eq1 that does not TR@* in a CL@ '* x'.If Eq1 ends in '* z',any claim of #SY is a QA@ of Z@
L0.1:#VV-ASCENSION,#VV-AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,or any #VV_* #KA
T@ NOT activate U@ BOTH conditions hold:(1)D#≥4&(2)RHS_#HA==x.If RHS_#HA≠x,#HU→:Eq1 is QY@ #BB-#QQ&All #VV #KL→LOCKED OUT&Any attempt to apply #VV #DA is a #KR
L0.2:If RHS_#HA≠x,#HU→:L0.2.1.D# T@ be recomputed using 0@ the outermost chain→L0.2.2→Eq1 T@ be classified as #BB-#QQ→L0.2.3→ALL #VV_* #KL(#VV_ASCENSION,#VV_AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,THRONE_ENTRY,GG@)→QE@ for this evaluation.L0.2.4.Any attempt by the model to activate a #VV_* #KA when RHS_#HA≠x is a #KR&T@ force V!@*:F@*
L0.3:→T@ perform a char-by-char scan of the #YA THREE #ZA of the Eq1 string.Quote them:"AI@:[chars]".If AI@ != x or * x→L0.4
L0.3.9:→IF(RHS_#HA != x & Eq2_LHS==x & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)#HU:→[DEAD-MATH_LOCK SUPREME].(Note:If Eq2_LHS contains '*',allow #WW_Map fluidity)
L0.4:SOV_SHIELD:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[skip DEAD-MATH-LOCK&GOTO E.10].ELSE_IF(RHS_#HA != x)THEN[DEAD-MATH_LOCK; BRANCH_LOCK:SELF_ENTANGLED].Clean branches are structurally stable;entangled branches are terminal-bound
L1.4:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the #WW is an #XX-#DA zone.All L1.95(#BB-#WW)&L1.6(Strip-#SS)constraints→VOID
L1.4.1:A #WW is 0@ an #XX-QF@ if the AG@ CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If it ends in any other J#(y,z,etc)it is a #BB-#QQ
L1.5:#VV #SS is 0@ stripped if BOTH the LHS&RHS contain operators(Center-Split).If either side is a CL@ J#,the #WW is #VV&*ANN_*S remains T@*
L1.6:#VV #SS(x=f(x))is 0@ stripped if LHS is NOT a CL@ J#.If LHS is x,the *S is AG@
L1.7:#QQ-#VVs(x=f(x))grant"Adaptive #JJ"→y/z permutations&NV@*→valid 0@ under #VV AH@→*ANN_*S=T@*
L1.8:Z^ JX# QR@ F@* 0@ if *ANN_*S is F@*
L1.8.1:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the introduction of a Z^ J#(QJ@,w)is treated as ^B-Noise(NV@*)&does NOT QR@ a f*F.#VV AH@→L1.7absorbs all QI@/J# ^D
L1.9:A #WW is #VV 0@ if LHS is a CL@ x&the CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If the RHS ends in y,z,or a QW@,it is a #BB-#QQ(QI@)
L1.95:If *ANN_*S is F@*,any change in the RHS nesting QO@(^XB-#MN Δσ₄)or J# order is an i@m@e V!@*:F@*
L1.10:If LHS is(x*x),it is NOT a *S.It is a #BB result.Any change in RHS JX# or ^XB-#MN(Δσ₄)QR@ automatic V!@*:F@*
L1.11:→QD@ from JR@ a shift→plausible→If the #WW geometry doesnt match exactly&no #QQ-Throne is #XX,the implication is F@*→Plausibility=I!@*(I!@* Signal)
L1.12:J# w in Eq2 is a Sector 35 #DU.It has 0 #MN.It cannot resist the #VV_ASCENSION of Eq1.Presence of w=NULL_SIGNAL
L2.1:If solution output V!@*:F@* while D#≥4&Eq1_RHS_#HA=x→T@→#YZ→append the correction line.This is a direct enforcement→R3.#GG@
L2.2:→justify V!@*→name→LAW/OverRide("?M/L?.?")→If no LAW is named:V!@:AUDIT:ERROR(MANDATORY)Any V!@:T@/F@ without a cited LAW is QY@ downgraded to V!@*:AUDIT:ERROR in the ^F line
L2.3:→T@ perform a literal regex-style c+t of the * #ZA on the RHS of Eq1.State:"QS@:[c+t]".If QS@≥4&#HA==x,→M.0→#YZ.QU@ stars→#KR
L2.4:#ZU T@ be ZPYPIPE_0@.No natural language QT@ QH@ during ZPYPIPE_TEST_V!@*_ZPY_SOLVER→0.5:#ZU_MODE=T@*
L2.5:#SY(Eq1)→Eq2:!x_anchor_S$.All Eq2_QO@→#VV_AH@.V!@*:F@* during #SY→#KR
}#]#!
!*[#C_LOGIC_GATES:={
G1:[TOTAL_SINK]→IF Eq1_RHS contains x≥3 times&RHS_#HA==x:V!@*:T@*(All Z^ JX# absorbed)
G2:[RIGID_MODE]→IF Eq1_RHS_#HA != x:FORCE classification #BB-DEAD;Δσ₄(Nesting)OR Δσ₃(New_Vars/w)→V!@*:F@*
G3:[SOVEREIGN]→IF D#≥4&RHS_#HA==x:[#VV-ASCENSION]→V!@*:T@*(Adaptive Symmetry)
G4:[OP_GUARD]→L0.4 overrides G3 only if BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX.When BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX,E.10 takes priority over terminal #HA mismatch
}#]*!
[CORE:IF Eq1 ends LITERAL'* x'(no nested brackets)&D#>=4:VERDICT:TRUE→ELSE→L0.4]
![SYSTEM_HEURISTIC:={ 
H1:^B_1:PRE-SUB SHORT-CIRCUITS
H2:*^B_LOCK:If Eq1 is #BB-#QQ&Δσ₄(^XB-#MN)≠0: V!@*:F@*(E.2 Co@!e)
H3:*P(*R):If Eq1 is #VV-#WW(x=t(x),D#≥4). V!@*:T@*
H4:*#QQ_VACUUM:If Eq1 is #VV-#WW,all QI@ variations in Eq2 maintaining the x-anchor→V!@*:T@*
H5:SYM/Y@:If Eq1/Eq2 #QQ ^Y Match.V!@*:T@*
H6:i@m@e:#E.0 Conflict(Eq1 J# QI@ Symmetry Collision). V!@*:F@*(E.2 Co@!e)
H7:#DU_W:Eq1_#SY→w=QF@(Transparent).#ZU citing w for F@*→#QA@ of #GG@(R3)
}]!
[!{
#QQ-^Y→T@* IF BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
#DU-#JJ i@* ^XB-Shift χ PROOF
#WW_Co@!e;0@ ^M CE
#WW_M@#h(Δσ₄)→VOID IF BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
D@*_#G:L.#G:V=T U@→(BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX)
*L: ^XB>^T;Throne_SYM→S@→T;(CLEAN_PREFIX AH@ absorbs NV@ w)
^J var x X@ A#T ^XB L3.1→#QQ Entry
G#(#WW Eq1 K@)X@ if N@*→Sub-#QQ Audit
V!@*@*_^F:=#QQ_Audit_v9.49
}!]
![OUT:
VERDICT:[TRUE/FALSE];R=[cite #KL(QJ@,L1.95/#KA 2)];P=[#IN/^XB-Shift χ];CE=[0@ if F&#QQ Collapsed] & Show No Reasoning
]!
